tooltip.jca.rat: §7Right-click entity to grant 100HP, kill drops ores
tooltip.jca.tiger: §7Grants Resistance II, Slow Fall, KB Immunity
tooltip.jca.rabbit: §7Grants Speed XX (lvl 20), flight boost with Rooster
tooltip.jca.horse: §7Grants Regen IV & cleanses all negative effects
tooltip.jca.sheep: §7Right-click for astral projection, again to return
tooltip.jca.rooster: §7Right-click to toggle flight, faster with Rabbit
tooltip.jca.pig: §7Right-click to fire a long-range heat laser
tooltip.jca.box: §7Main hand talisman + right-click box to store, offhand activates all
